title: Short Video Cover Pack
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for reusable short-video thumbnail systems that balance face crop, hook zone, category signal, and account-level visual consistency.

en.title: Short Video Cover Pack
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for reusable short-video thumbnail systems that balance face crop, hook zone, category signal, and account-level visual consistency.

zh-CN.title: 短视频封面系统
zh-CN.description: 为短视频频道构建可复用缩略图系统，测试人物抓点、标题钩子区、栏目识别和账号统一性。
